---
title: "Talks"
---

<div class="talks-list">

  <div class="talk-item">
    <div class="talk-abbr">Chapel Hill</div>
    <div class="talk-body">
      <div class="talk-title">Conference on Extreme Value Analysis – Chapel Hill, USA</div>
      <div class="talk-date">2025</div>
      <div class="talk-links">
        <a class="talk-btn" href="https://eva2025.unc.edu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">WEBSITE</a>
        <a class="talk-btn" href="slides/eva2025.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SLIDES</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="talk-item">
    <div class="talk-abbr">Dresden</div>
    <div class="talk-body">
      <div class="talk-title">German Probability and Statistics Days – Dresden, Germany</div>
      <div class="talk-date">2025</div>
      <div class="talk-links">
        <a class="talk-btn" href="slides/gpsd2025.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SLIDES</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="talk-item">
    <div class="talk-abbr">Online</div>
    <div class="talk-body">
      <div class="talk-title">ECOSTA – online</div>
      <div class="talk-date">2025</div>
      <div class="talk-links">
        <a class="talk-btn" href="https://www.cmstatistics.org/EcoSta2025/index.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">WEBSITE</a>
        <a class="talk-btn" href="slides/ecosta2025.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SLIDES</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="talk-item">
    <div class="talk-abbr">Berlin</div>
    <div class="talk-body">
      <div class="talk-title">CMStatistics – Berlin, Germany</div>
      <div class="talk-date">2023</div>
      <div class="talk-links">
        <a class="talk-btn" href="https://www.cmstatistics.org/CMStatistics2023/index.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">WEBSITE</a>
        <a class="talk-btn" href="slides/cmstatistics2023.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SLIDES</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
